Live Music Log

September 22, 2018

A running list of bands I’ve seen… (photos collected here)

2018

  • April 24: Afghan Whigs / Built to Spill
  • June 3: Kendrick Lamar / Schoolboy Q / Jay Rock / etc.
  • August 3: Descendents / A Wilhelm Scream / Pavers
  • August 8: Band of Horses / Bonny Doon
  • September 21: Bully / JEFF the Brotherhood / Made Violent
  • September 25: J. Cole / Young Thug
  • October 30: The Breeders
  • November 2: Ian Sweet (?)
  • November 10: Cursive (?)

2017

  • Buried Alive / Chokehold / Jesus Piece / Trail of Lies / Clear Focus
  • Beach Slang
  • Sebadoh
  • Quicksand / No Joy
  • The New Pornographers / Cloud Nothings
  • Saintseneca
  • Frightened Rabbit / Torres
  • Wavves
  • Minus the Bear / Beach Slang

2016

  • Ted Leo / Ian Sweet
  • Longest War
  • Dave Smalley / Against All Hope
  • Rogue Wave
  • Failures’ Union
  • Snapcase / Endpoint / Grade
  • Judge / World Be Free / Black X
  • Neko Case / Jennifer O’Connor

2015

  • Desaparecidos / The So So Glos
  • Knapsack
  • Waxahatchee / Girlpool
  • Kool AD
  • St. Vincent (Mar 5)
  • Blonde Redhead
  • Quicksand
  • Neutral Milk Hotel (Apr 21)
  • Sleater-Kinney / Waxahatchee
  • Saintseneca / The Sidekicks (Oct 14)

2014

  • Longest War
  • Grade
  • Pinback / Tera Melos
  • Field Trip (TO): Broken Social Scene / Constantines / CHVRCHES / Washed Out / Gord Downie & The Sadies / Hydra / Fucked Up / Do Make Say Think / BadBadNotGood / Lowell

2013

  • Frightened Rabbit / Wintersleep (TO)
  • Frightened Rabbit / (Rochester, Oct 19)
  • Broken Social Scene

2012

  • Rev25 NYC (Oct 11, 12, 13): Chain of Strength / Bold / Into Another / Texas is the Reason / Sick of it All / Shades Apart / Supertouch / Battery / Damnation AD / Underdog / Gameface / Mouthpiece / Youth of Today

2008
